security.unavailableLead: Жоден постачальник безпеки не відповів цьому запиту для вашої організації.

proactive.discoveryLead: Aipify mapped {provider} in your proactive monitoring catalog — status: {status}.
proactive.discoveryExplanation: Capabilities below come from registered proactive organization engines, advisor bundles, and Command Brief sources. Recommendations prepare and inform — Aipify never auto-executes recommended actions in Companion runtime.
proactive.signalSummaryLead: Aipify prioritized {count} proactive signals for your organization.
proactive.signalSummaryExplanation: Signals are sorted by severity, freshness, confidence, business impact, and unresolved status — only items with verified source data are shown.
proactive.verifiedProvider: Proactive source is prepared or verified for your organization.
proactive.disconnectedProvider: Provider runtime adapter is not connected — governed discovery only.
proactive.unavailableLead: No proactive provider matched this request for your organization.
proactive.unavailableExplanation: Proactive capabilities are discovered from registered manifests — none matched this query.
proactive.emptySignalBasisLead: No proactive signals with verified source data matched this request.
proactive.emptySignalBasisExplanation: Aipify only surfaces alerts, recommendations, and attention items when underlying engines report source metadata — no synthetic signals are generated.
proactive.externalUnavailableLead: External proactive monitoring adapters are not connected for your organization.
proactive.externalUnavailableExplanation: No live external proactive adapter is registered. Aipify does not auto-execute recommendations or dismiss alerts in Companion runtime.
proactive.blockedOperationLead: This proactive operation is not available in Companion runtime.
proactive.blockedOperationExplanation: Auto-executing recommendations, auto-dismissing alerts, and auto-resolving signals are blocked in this phase. Aipify prepares governed actions — you decide and approve via Approval Center.
proactive.permissionDenied: Your role cannot access the proactive monitoring catalog.
proactive.entitlementBlocked: Proactive capabilities are unavailable while the organization subscription is paused.
proactive.privacyNote: Metadata-first proactive intelligence — sensitive data is sanitized and private content is never exposed in Companion runtime.
proactive.policyNote: Recommendations require explicit approval before any action. Role-based permissions, tenant isolation, and audit logging apply to all proactive signals.
proactive.recommendationAutoExecuteBlocked: Auto-executing recommendations is blocked — humans decide and approve.
proactive.noRecommendationWithoutSource: No recommendation is surfaced without verified source data.
proactive.noFalseAlerts: No false alerts — signals require underlying engine source metadata.
proactive.sensitiveDataSanitized: Sensitive fields are sanitized from proactive signal summaries.
proactive.roleBasedAccessActive: Role-based access permissions are enforced for this organization.

analytics.unsupportedCorrelationLead: Aipify cannot infer cross-module correlation without explicit grounded source linkage.
analytics.unsupportedCorrelationExplanation: Comparable metrics from multiple modules may be shown as facts side by side — Aipify does not assume cause, correlation, or root cause without source-backed linkage.

analytics.insightAutoApplyBlocked: Auto-applying insights is blocked — humans decide and approve.
analytics.noRecommendationWithoutBasis: No recommendation is surfaced without verified metric or signal basis.
analytics.noInferredCorrelation: No inferred correlation — cross-module views list facts only.

whatIsApi.directAnswer: An API is a secure way for two systems to communicate with each other. Access is limited to what your organization has approved, and read-only access should be used first so Aipify can retrieve information without changing anything.
